title: jwt_token_generation
description: Test the /api/auth/token/ endpoint by submitting valid username and password to verify that JWT access and refresh tokens are correctly generated and returned.

title: jwt_token_refresh
description: Test the /api/auth/token/refresh/ endpoint by submitting a valid refresh token to verify that a new JWT access token is issued successfully.

title: get_user_notifications
description: Test the /api/notifications/ endpoint with a valid authentication token to verify that the authenticated user can retrieve their list of notifications.

title: get_unread_notification_count
description: Test the /api/unread-count/ endpoint with a valid authentication token to verify that the authenticated user can retrieve the correct count of unread notifications.

title: system_health_check
description: Test the /health/ endpoint to verify that the system health status is correctly reported, including database and cache connectivity, without requiring authentication.

title: system_readiness_check
description: Test the /ready/ endpoint to verify that the system readiness status is correctly reported and the system is ready to serve requests, without requiring authentication.
